headline: SK Hynix Posts 400% Profit Rise. Micron Stock Is Falling.
summary: SK Hynix  reported surging quarterly profit on the back of a memory-chip shortage that could last for years. SK Hynix executives told analysts that demand for high-bandwidth memory—a crucial component for artificial-intelligence chips from the likes of  Nvidia  —outstrips current supply capacity for the next three years.
